Email warmup 2-4 weeks minimum. Start 5-10 emails/day gradually increase 4-6 weeks. Slow consistent beats brute-force.
Max 100 emails/day per address to mimic human behavior. One sending address per domain. Multiple domains spread volume. Warm constantly 15% of sends.
Erratic volume kills deliverability. 500 Mon nothing Tue-Thu then 1000 Fri = suspicious. Keep Gmail Postmaster spam rate under 0.3% aim 0.1%.
Never send cold from primary domain. Subdomain (outreach.yourcompany.com) + SPF DKIM DMARC authentication.
2026 winners shift volume to precision. Intelligence-led outbound. Intent signals. Engagement-first metrics.
Indie Hackers 3-8x higher conversion than Product Hunt for founder-focused products. Requires 4-6 month sustained engagement vs single launch.
Launch in 3 places only: Indie Hackers relevant subreddit one niche Slack. Measure 1 metric: MRR. Everything else is vanity.
reviewer_notes: 3 launch channels only. MRR only metric.

TechCrunch coverage = 50 users. Well-placed Reddit comment = 500. Focus on what converts not what sounds impressive.
